items.name_en: Size: 16*26*9cm. CHANEL Overseas Channel Stock 19 Series Goatskin Flap Bag. The CHANEL 19 bag is the last design Karl Lagerfeld participated in before his passing. It features enlarged classic quilting and a chain strap design, retaining the classic while upgrading practicality and comfort! The name '19' comes from time, just like the 2.55, so you know it was born in 2019. It also covers Coco Chanel's birthday. Imported goatskin, fine and soft texture, feels fluffy when held.
items.name_cn: Size: 16*26*9cm. CHANEL Overseas Channel Stock 19 Series Goatskin Flap Bag. The CHANEL 19 bag is the last design Karl Lagerfeld participated in before his passing. items.name_en: Chanel vintage Victoria Beckham Backpack Limited Edition
items.name_cn:
Chanel vintage Victoria Beckham Backpack Limited Edition
Chanel jumbo Victoria Beckham backpack. The backpack version of the Victoria Beckham bag is very special, plus the large double C logo, it's handsome and eye-catching, very stylish. It's hard to find someone with the same bag. Very vintage. Has a built-in zipper, very practical. A bag suitable for both personal use and collection.
AS1102 Dimensions: 28*8*20cm

items.name_en: Chane1 New 24K Hobo Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
Chane1 New 24K Hobo Shoulder Bag
24K thick chain hobo bag, stunning looks! Small lambskin feels great, love it! Soft and smooth
Wearing the double C strap with the thick chain adds more fashion flair
Retro yet stylish, easy to match any style, effortlessly creating a casual relaxed vibe, lightweight and super comfortable!!
Hardware: Thick plated 24k vintage gold
Leather: ZP small lambskin
Dimensions: 17*24*5cm
Model: AS5177

items.name_en: Chanel Black Denim CF 25cm Real Photos
items.name_cn:
Chanel Black Denim CF 25cm Real Photos
I love this Chanel denim style so much 💙 Couldn't wait to get it
A color that looks like it might be hard to pull off, but actually gives you a pleasant surprise 👍👍
Worn, it will definitely be the most unique and dazzling fairy 🫡 Elegance and fashion are its synonyms, right? ❤️‍🔥 Black denim, paired with a silver chain and silver hardware, it's hard not to love ❤️
CF 25cm size, capacity is more than enough, great for shopping or dates, and it's so beautiful to have one with a bestie❗️❗️ This is a super long-lasting bestseller you can carry for years 💙
Size: 25cm
Model: 1112 Denim

items.name_en: Chanel 24A Kelly Black Denim Large Size Available
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24A Kelly Black Denim Large Size Available
It's really so cute to me 🤩 The highest demand this season 🤩 Another retro fashion cycle 📣 The 1997 Kelly returns again 🫶 This time with a chain, retro yet stylish 🌠 The "King" is still the King 🔥 Can be carried as a handbag or crossbody, very lightweight, rich retro flavor, this feeling is just right 👌👌
Large size isn't too big~ Can fit an iPhone Pro, but not the Max, a bit of a stretch~ Exquisite but not too heavy, interior capacity is sufficient for daily use, the more you look at it, the more you like it, can't resist the girly heart 👸
Model: AS4416
Size: 19*13*7cm

items.name_en: [Factory Version] Chanel 23A Mini 31bag Green Tweed
items.name_cn:
[Factory Version] Chanel 23A Mini 31bag Green Tweed
A fluffy teddy style~ Did this grow up eating cute things!! The new 31bag has a plush version, who can resist this! A limited item for Autumn/Winter, the level of popularity is obvious, incredibly soft touch, full of retro sentiment, the essence of the 31 is the lazy feel after folding~ Freshness as a shoulder bag or handbag, the calfskin body is amazing, the combination of leather chain and leather thin shoulder strap is just too lovely~
Size: 22*23*5.5cm
Model: AS4133
